TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rwanda, title = Rwanda, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rwanda} }

S.FORM: Rwanda hya' ga cyux maki' tay 2 00 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 26,338 sq km (maki' tay 149ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 24,668 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,670 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 12,988,423. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 74.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 18%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 7.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kigali. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Paul Kagame, aring ryax 22 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Rwanda hya' ga cyux maki' tay 2 00 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 26,338 sq km (maki' tay 149ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 24,668 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,670 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 12,988,423. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 74.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 18%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 7.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kigali. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Paul Kagame, aring ryax 22 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: rwan*a ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ki…£ali. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a paul ka…£ame, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
